### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 8 (t=45s): Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, falling. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on F#. Developing.

Cycle 10 (t=55s): Quiet, sustained. Dark timbre. Very sparse articulation with space. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Developing.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: Pivot station — first muhayyar approach (Tahwil at cycle 7. Composite scene — open palm in low candlelight, moonlight bloom, a single text fragment. Sustained on G; loose linen falls; quiet hold at cycle 10 with a single feather at rest.)
Cycle intent: TAHWIL. Composite scene: open palm (large inset, breathe preset), warm bloom SVG, text 'a quiet rising'. Background shifts to warm radial-gradient. Elevation, not impact.
Energy hint: high
